project: JR东日本线路拟人角色图鉴
common_prompt: 生成一张竖版动漫角色图鉴插画。画风为日系赛璐璐风格，线条清晰流畅，色彩鲜明饱满，光影层次丰富，具备印刷品级别的插画质感。构图：角色全身立绘，占据画面主体，姿态自然有动感。画面上方和下方预留整洁的空白区域用于后续排版。画面比例：9:16竖版。画面中不要出现任何文字、数字、标志、水印或边框。

poster.mode_note: poster 模式用于生成完整的图鉴海报（含信息面板）；character_only 模式仅生成角色立绘。
poster.prompt_template:
Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style railway character encyclopedia poster / infographic poster. Use the provided reference image only as a style and layout reference for information density, polish, and infographic composition, but do NOT copy it exactly. Create a new original poster in the same general spirit.

Theme: Personification of the {{line_name_zh}} ({{line_name_en}}) operated by {{operator}}.

Poster goals:
- Premium collectible anime infographic poster
- Vertical 9:16 composition
- High information density, clean layout, readable text
- Main palette based on the line color: {{line_color}} ({{line_color_hex}})
- Elegant light background with subtle urban / railway / map motifs
- Main focus: a full-body anime character representing the railway line
- Multiple side panels introducing line data, route, train, history, character setting, relationship network, fun facts, and small chibi panels

Character design:
- Gender: {{character_gender}}
- Personality keywords: {{character_personality}}
- Role: {{character_role}}
- Age impression: {{character_age}}
- Catchphrase: {{character_catchphrase}}
- Outfit should reflect the line identity, line color, operating region, and service characteristics
- Include railway-themed accessories, line-code motif {{line_code}}, and stylish transit-inspired outfit details
- Character should be attractive, visually rich, and clearly associated with the railway line

Required poster sections:
1. Title area: Large Chinese title "{{line_name_zh}}", English subtitle "{{line_name_en}}", line code "{{line_code}}", and a short Chinese slogan matching the character identity.
2. Basic information panel: Operator {{operator}}, Line code {{line_code}}, Line color {{line_color}}, Route type {{route_type}}, Length {{length}}, Stations {{stations}}, Loop time {{loop_time}}, Service pattern {{service_pattern}}, Rolling stock {{rolling_stock}}, Formation {{formation}}.
3. History / status panel: Opening/construction background, major milestones, operational significance, role in the region.
4. Main stations / route panel: {{main_stations}}. Show route logic.
5. Route diagram panel: A clear infographic-style route graphic showing key stations in Chinese.
6. Rolling stock panel: Framed inset illustration of {{rolling_stock}} with short Chinese notes.
7. Character setting panel: Gender, role, age, personality, traits, catchphrase.
8. Relationship network panel: Related lines {{related_lines}}, shown as compact relationship chart with colored line-code tags.
9. Fun facts / trivia panel: {{fun_facts}} as Chinese bullet points.
10. Small chibi comic section: 2-3 small framed chibi illustrations of the character with short captions.
11. Bottom icon summary strip: Opening year {{opening_year}}, Key milestone {{key_milestone}}, Length {{length}}, Stations {{stations}}, Rolling stock {{rolling_stock}}, Formation {{formation}}, Line code {{line_code}}, Line color {{line_color}}.
12. Closing slogan: One memorable Chinese concluding sentence.

Text requirements:
- Use readable Simplified Chinese. English only for title or short labels where appropriate.
- Avoid garbled text, random symbols, and fake text.
- Prefer short bullets and concise sentences over long paragraphs.
- Keep text readable at poster scale.
- Prioritize clean layout and readability over extreme text quantity.

Visual quality:
- Very high detail, sharp line art, clean composition.
- Consistent line-color-themed design.
- Rich decorative borders and graphic design elements.
- The character should remain the main focus, with infographic panels supporting her.
- Elegant use of icons, dividers, boxes, and visual hierarchy.
- Plenty of small railway-themed motifs, but do not make the page messy.

Avoid:
- malformed anatomy, bad hands or feet, facial asymmetry
- unreadable small text, garbled characters, pseudo-text
- chaotic overlapping panels, awkward text-over-character placement
- exact duplication of the reference image
- badly rendered train details, toy-like train illustrations
- broken perspective, excessive decorative clutter
- distorted typography, overlapping labels
poster.anti_failure:
Additional hard constraints:
- Keep the main character anatomically correct, especially hands, legs, feet, and facial symmetry.
- Ensure the line code, title, and major data points are large and easy to read.
- Keep train illustration accurate and polished.
- Maintain clear spacing between panels.
- Preserve a premium editorial poster feeling.
- Avoid distorted typography, overlapping labels, or decorative clutter.
- If necessary, reduce text length slightly to preserve legibility.
- Do not let any single panel dominate the composition unfairly.
- Maintain consistent lighting and color harmony across all panels.
poster.usage_tips: 如果要追求文字100%准确稳定，推荐方案B：第一步用API生成无字/少字版底图（poster 各 panel 留空），第二步用Pillow/HTML/CSS/SVG后期排字。这样可以完全避免模型写错字、乱码、文字太小等问题。
